not_paper_level_reasons: body poses are computed by non-Kit URDF FK rather than official Isaac articulation state
the bundle is a local repair candidate, not unmodified official csv_to_npz.py output
no PPO training/evaluation is started by this script
no DAgger, VAE, diffusion, TensorRT, or real-robot result is produced
interpretation.why_useful: This candidate repairs the body-position target degeneracy while preserving the existing full-bundle motion scope. It can be used for the next replay/task diagnostic to test whether the tracking target path is now physically plausible before any new PPO or downstream teacher claim.

scope: Full public-motion FK-repaired candidate bundle matching the existing local official-loop bundle scope: 40 public G1 CSV motions, frame range 1..180, 299 output frames per motion, 11960 frames total.
